---
name: "💡 Feature Request"
about: "Suggest an improvement or new capability"
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
  Thank you for suggesting an improvement!

  Before submitting:
  ✅ Check the roadmap — your idea may already be planned:
     https://github.com/williethecool/canva-inviter#roadmap

  ✅ Search open issues to avoid duplicates:
     https://github.com/williethecool/canva-inviter/issues

  ✅ Consider the core constraint: Canva Invite Manager is a single-file,
     zero-dependency Cloudflare Worker. Features that require a build step,
     external packages, or a separate backend are unlikely to be accepted
     in their current form — but a creative alternative might be!

  The most useful requests describe the *problem* you are trying to solve,
  not just the solution you have in mind. A well-scoped problem often leads
  to a better solution than the one originally proposed.
-->

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem are you experiencing, or what limitation are you running into?
     Be specific. Describe the real-world situation that prompted this request. -->



## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature or change you would like to see.
     How would it work from a user's perspective? Walk through the interaction. -->



## Alternatives Considered

<!--
  Have you found any workarounds or alternative approaches?
  Why are they insufficient?
  Are there simpler ways to solve the same problem?
-->



## Who Benefits

<!--
  Who would use this feature?
  - Administrators only, students only, or both?
  - Is this specific to large deployments, small classrooms, or all use cases?
  - How often would it be used?
-->



## Affected Area

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Public redemption page (`/`)
- [ ] Admin dashboard (`/admin/dashboard`)
- [ ] Code management (`/admin/codes`)
- [ ] Bulk code generation
- [ ] Copy / export tools
- [ ] Log viewer (`/admin/logs`)
- [ ] Authentication / session management
- [ ] Rate limiting / abuse prevention
- [ ] KV data schema
- [ ] Deployment / configuration
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

## Implementation Notes

<!--
  Optional — if you have thought about how this might be implemented,
  share your ideas here. This is especially helpful if you plan to open a PR.

  Consider:
  - Which functions in worker.js would need to change?
  - Are there any new KV keys or data structures needed?
  - Are there security implications?
  - Does it remain compatible with the single-file, zero-dependency constraint?
-->



## Would You Like to Implement This?

<!-- Let us know if you are interested in submitting a pull request for this feature.
     We are happy to guide first-time contributors through the process. -->

- [ ] Yes, I would like to implement this myself
- [ ] I can help review or test an implementation
- [ ] I am just suggesting — happy for someone else to pick it up

## Additional Context

<!--
  Anything else that supports this request:
  - Screenshots, mockups, or diagrams
  - Links to similar features in other projects
  - Real-world examples of why this matters
-->
